antipattern.description: Cross-encoder served without warmup; first query takes 8s.
antipattern.reason: p95 latency violates SLA. Detector: histogram shows bimodal tail. Fix: r3-warm-the-encoder.

antipattern.description: Config pins 'cohere-rerank-latest'; scores change after vendor releases v4.
antipattern.reason: Cross-deploy comparison invalid. Detector: model identifier non-immutable. Fix: r4-document-version-pin.

antipattern.description: Reranker call fails and the whole request returns 5xx.
antipattern.reason: Reliability drops. Detector: 5xx correlated with reranker timeouts. Fix: r5-fallback-on-rerank-fail.
